name: gsa-calc-mcp
description: MCP server for GSA CALC+ Labor Ceiling Rates. Rate benchmarking for IGCEs and price analysis.
long_description:
Queries the GSA CALC+ API for awarded not-to-exceed hourly rates from GSA MAS contracts (230K+ records). Search by labor category, education, experience, SIN, vendor, or business size. Returns rates with statistical aggregations (mean, median, percentiles, std dev).

8 tools. No authentication required. CALC+ rates are ceiling rates (maximum a contractor can charge), not prices paid.

Hardened across 5 audit rounds with 314 regression tests (39.3 per tool). 86 findings fixed in earlier rounds (filtered_browse returning 265,000 unfiltered records, pydantic bool-to-int silent coercion on sin parameters, Elasticsearch 10k-result window overflow). Round 5 added a Hypothesis-driven punishment suite (~25,000 random probes through every validator) plus 122 live tests covering all 8 tools across common labor categories, all education levels, all worksites, real vendors, and pagination at depth. Zero new bugs in round 5.
